_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: This treatment inhibited the growth of erg6Δ ira2Δ by 86% and that of erg6Δ strain by 62%
details: UC1 treatment inhibited erg6Δ strain growth by 62% after 8 hours at 10 μM
